headline: Apartments.com Releases Multifamily Rent Growth Report for June 2026
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., June 24, 2026--Today Apartments.com, an industry-leading online marketplace of CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), published its latest report on multifamily rent trends for June 2026.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on CoStar Group, Lowers Price Target to $26
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $33 to $26.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on CoStar Group, Lowers Price Target to $26
raw.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $33 to $26.

headline: 1 Services Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. Furthermore, the demand for their offerings is rising as more clients outsource non-core functions, a trend that has enabled the industry to return 7.7% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
